ham.subject: Subscription Renewal Notice – Action Required
ham.body:
Dear [Name],

This is a friendly reminder that your subscription to Acme SaaS will renew on 30th April 2026. The renewal amount of INR 1200 will be charged to your saved payment method.

If you wish to pause, upgrade, or update your billing details, please visit <URL>.

Thank you for choosing Acme SaaS. We appreciate your continued support.

Best regards,
Acme SaaS Team

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required – Gift Card Confirmation Needed
spam.body:
Dear [Name],

Main Rahul Mehta, CEO of XYZ Corp. Aapka account security check ke liye $25 Amazon gift card chahiye. 24 ghante ke andar gift card code bheje. Agar aapne abhi tak code share nahi kiya hai, to aapka account suspend ho sakta hai.

Kripya <URL> visit karein aur apna gift card code share karein.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Best,
Rahul Mehta
CEO, XYZ Corp
